subject: Contract renewal — need your signature by Friday
body:
Hi,

Hope you're doing well. I wanted to follow up on the contract renewal we discussed last week. We need your signature on the updated terms before Friday EOD to avoid a service interruption.

I've attached the revised contract. Key changes are on pages 3 and 7 (pricing update and SLA adjustment).

Please let me know if you have any questions.

Best,
John

subject: This week in AI: GPT-5 rumors, open source wins, and more
body:
Welcome to this week's Tech Digest!

subject: URGENT: Confidential business proposal — $4.5M transfer
body:
Dear Friend,

I am Prince Emmanuel, son of late King Bello of Nigeria. I have inherited $4.5 million USD but cannot access it due to government restrictions. I need a trusted foreign partner to transfer these funds. You will receive 30% commission.

God bless,
Prince Emmanuel
